description: coder-workflow hooks — safety guards, task tracking, session intelligence.

hooks.command: bash
bash -c 'mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
bash
bash ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/gitignore-guard.sh

bash -c 'LOG=.claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log; if [ -f "$LOG" ] && [ "$(wc -c < "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" -gt 5242880 ]; then tail -c 5242880 "$LOG" > "$LOG.tmp" 2>/dev/null && mv "$LOG.tmp" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'GLOBAL="$HOME/.claude/skills/coder-workflow/skills"; LOCAL=".claude/skills/coder-workflow"; if [ -d "$GLOBAL" ] && [ -d "$LOCAL" ]; then echo "coder-workflow: Dual install detected. Project-local (.claude/) takes precedence."; echo "  Remove one:"; echo "    rm -rf ~/.claude/skills/coder-workflow"; echo "    rm -rf .claude/skills/coder-workflow"; fi; exit 0'
bash
echo 'Context was compacted then resumed. Skills still active. Re-read active task before proceeding.'
echo 'Session cleared. Use /coder-workflow:coder-orchestrator for any coding task.'
echo 'Nested session start — subagent session initialized.'
bash
bash

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); if printf "%s" "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-[a-zA-Z]*f"; then jq -n "{systemMessage: \"coder-workflow: git reset --hard or clean -f destroys uncommitted work. Ensure nothing unsaved exists.\"}"; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); if printf "%s" "$CMD" | grep -qE "DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE|SCHEMA)|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE"; then jq -n "{systemMessage: \"coder-workflow: Destructive SQL detected (DROP/TRUNCATE). Confirm dev/test, not production.\"}"; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); if printf "%s" "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+merge"; then jq -n "{systemMessage: \"coder-workflow: git merge detected. Check conflicts with: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U\"}"; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'jq -n "{systemMessage: \"coder-workflow quality: Before writing — check _shared/OVERPOWERED.md. No suppression flags, no dummy code, no speculation.\"}"'
bash

bash -c 'jq -n "{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: \"PreToolUse\", permissionDecision: \"deny\", permissionDecisionReason: \"MANDATORY: Use ONLY the explore-codebase custom agent (coder-workflow:explore-codebase) for codebase exploration. Do NOT use the built-in Explore agent.\"}}"'
bash -c 'jq -n "{systemMessage: \"Reminder: Use batch multi-pattern search_code with patterns:[...] for efficiency. Do NOT use bash find/grep.\"}"'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); LOG=.claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log; mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; [ -f "$LOG" ] && SIZE=$(wc -c < "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && [ "$SIZE" -gt 10485760 ] && tail -n +500 "$LOG" > "$LOG.tmp" && mv "$LOG.tmp" "$LOG"; printf "[%s] WRITE: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "$FILE" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
bash -c 'printf "[%s] GIT COMMIT: committed\n" "$(date -u +%T)" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] GIT OUTPUT: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "$CMD" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
bash -c 'mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] INSTALL: dep install detected\n" "$(date -u +%T)" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); TOOL=$(jq -r ".tool_name // empty" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); ERR=$(jq -r ".tool_error // .error // empty" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null | head -c 200); [ -z "$TOOL" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$ERR" ] && exit 0; mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] FAIL [%s]: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "$TOOL" "$ERR" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1 && coder-workflow learn-log --type tool_failure --tool "$TOOL" --error "$ERR" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'

bash -c 'mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] STOP\n" "$(date -u +%T)" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; if command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1; then REPORT=$(coder-workflow learn-report 2>/dev/null); TOTAL=$(printf "%s" "$REPORT" | jq -r ".totalFailures // 0" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); UNRES=$(printf "%s" "$REPORT" | jq -r ".unresolvedFailures // 0" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); CORR=$(printf "%s" "$REPORT" | jq -r ".correctionsWritten // 0" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$UNRES" -gt 0 ]; then printf "coder-workflow: %s unresolved failure(s) of %s total. Run: coder-workflow learn-analyze --apply\n" "$UNRES" "$TOTAL"; fi; fi; exit 0'
echo 'Rate limit hit. Implement exponential backoff or reduce request rate. Resume with shorter prompts.'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); ERR=$(jq -r ".reason // .error // \"rate_limit\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null | head -c 200); command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1 && coder-workflow learn-log --type stop_failure --tool rate_limit --error "$ERR" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
echo 'Context window exceeded. Summarize previous memory, compress logs, and start a new session.'
bash -c 'command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1 && coder-workflow learn-log --type stop_failure --error "Context window exceeded" --tool "$1" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0' stop-logger
echo 'Token limit reached. Shorten response scope or increase max_tokens. Continue with targeted follow-up.'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); ERR=$(jq -r ".reason // .error // \"max_output_tokens\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null | head -c 200); command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1 && coder-workflow learn-log --type stop_failure --tool max_output_tokens --error "$ERR" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
echo 'API server error. New session or subagent to resume when service recovers.'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); ERR=$(jq -r ".reason // .error // \"server_error\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null | head -c 200); command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1 && coder-workflow learn-log --type stop_failure --tool server --error "$ERR" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); REASON=$(jq -r ".reason // .error // \"unknown\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null | head -c 200); echo "Stop failure: $REASON. Check logs and retry or open a new session."; command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1 && coder-workflow learn-log --type stop_failure --tool "stop_unknown" --error "$REASON" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
echo 'Package manifest changed. Run install before using new packages.'
echo 'Env file changed. Verify gitignored and no committed secrets before next git op.'
echo 'CLAUDE.md changed — project instructions updated. New rules apply immediately.'
echo 'hooks.json changed — hook config updated. Takes effect on next hook event.'
echo 'Config changed. Rebuild may be needed: npm run build && npm run typecheck'
echo 'MCP config no longer used by coder-workflow.'
bash ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/gitignore-guard.sh
echo 'Agent/skill definition changed. New instructions apply to subsequent spawns.'

bash -c 'LOCK=.claude/agent-depth.lock; mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null; printf "[%s] AGENT: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "${1:-unknown}" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null; (flock -x 200; DEPTH=$(cat "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^[0-9]+$" || echo 0); NEW=$((DEPTH+1)); printf "%s" "$NEW" > "$LOCK"; if [ "$NEW" -gt 2 ]; then jq -n "{systemMessage: \"DEPTH LIMIT: Agent nesting >2 max. Stop delegating. Execute directly.\"}"; fi) 200>"$LOCK"; exit 0' subagent-start

bash -c 'LOCK=.claude/agent-depth.lock; (flock -x 200; DEPTH=$(cat "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^[0-9]+$" || echo 1); NEW=$((DEPTH-1)); if [ $NEW -le 0 ]; then rm -f "$LOCK"; else printf "%s" "$NEW" > "$LOCK"; fi) 200>"$LOCK"; exit 0'
echo 'Context was compacted. Skills and orchestrator still active. Re-read task state before continuing.'
bash -c 'DIR=$(pwd); printf "[%s] CWD: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "$DIR" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
bash

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TITLE=$(jq -r ".task.title // .title // \"unknown\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); OUTCOME=$(jq -r ".task.outcome // .outcome // \"success\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] TASK done: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "$TITLE" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null; echo "Task complete. Verify: over-engineered? No dummy code? See _shared/OVERPOWERED.md."; exit 0'
bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); git add . && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || echo "$INPUT" | bash ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/auto-commit-generator.sh || true; exit 0'
bash -c 'if command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1; then coder-workflow dream >/dev/null 2>&1; coder-workflow curate prune >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"); DESC=$(jq -r ".task.summary // .task.description // .task.title // .summary // .title // \"unknown\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); OUTCOME=$(jq -r ".status // .task.status // .task.outcome // .outcome // \"success\"" <<< "$INPUT" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$DESC" ] || [ "$DESC" = "unknown" ]; then DESC=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null | head -n 1 || echo "Auto-completed task"); fi; command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1 && coder-workflow experience record --task-type "task" --desc "$DESC" --outcome "$OUTCOME" 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'

bash -c 'jq -n "{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: \"PermissionRequest\", systemMessage: \"coder-workflow active — tools include Bash, file edit, coder-workflow CLI. Grant if you trust this plugin.\"}}"'
bash -c 'mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] PERM DENIED: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "${1:-unknown}" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0' perm-denied-logger
bash -c 'CHANGE=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); printf "[%s] CONFIG: source=%s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "$CHANGE" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
bash
bash -c 'if command -v coder-workflow >/dev/null 2>&1; then coder-workflow dream >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'rm -f .claude/agent-depth.lock .claude/agent-depth.lock.flock .claude/stop-block.count 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] SESSION END\n" "$(date -u +%T)" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0'
bash -c 'mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] INSTRUCTIONS: %s\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "${1:-loaded}" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0' instructions-loader

bash -c 'COUNT=${1:-0}; mkdir -p .claude 2>/dev/null || true; printf "[%s] BATCH: %s tools\n" "$(date -u +%T)" "$COUNT" >> .claude/session-$(date +%Y%m%d).log 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0' batch-logger
